mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Attractions WHERE id = #{placeId}
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, title, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM Plans WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Plans (user_id, title, start_date, end_date, status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, 'ONGOING', NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, title, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM Plans WHERE id = #{planId}
SELECT id AS detailId, plan_id AS planId, place_id AS placeId, sequence, day FROM Plans_Details WHERE plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY day ASC, sequence ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE Plans SET status = 'COMPLETED' WHERE status = 'ONGOING' AND end_date < CURRENT_DATE()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Plans_Details (plan_id, place_id, day, sequence) VALUES (#{planId}, #{detail.placeId}, #{detail.day}, #{detail.sequence})
